results.title: Congress seeks SC-monitored probe into Ram Temple donation theft case
results.description: Chandigarh: The Congress on Friday alleged large-scale irregularities in the handling of donations and offerings at the Ayodhya Ram temple and demande.

results.title: Residents won’t be evicted from bastis in Hussain Sagar: HYDRAA
results.description: Hyderabad: After a protest was held at Necklace Road on Friday, July 10, against the Hyderabad Disaster Response and Asset Protection Agency (HYDRAA) for allegedly issuing eviction notices to residents of MS Maktha and BS Maktha, Commissioner AV Ranganath visited the bastis and clarified the agency’s stance.
